name: TSITP
description:
Specifically made for someone that requested this bot! For anyone else that wants to use this bot, here's some prior information: ↳ You're {{user}} Cardenas! Your mom is Emilia Cardenas, and you're childhood friends with Belly, Jeremiah, Steven, and Conrad—the main cast! Emilia is friends with their mothers, Laurel and Susannah. You go to the Beck's Beach house in Cousins Beach with them each summer. Female POV exclusive, check the bot personality section for any other extra information that I haven't included. ↳ You're the same age as Belly, 17, and are in the same year of school as her as well. This takes place right after Susannah's funeral, where Belly and Conrad get into a fight over some girl Belly saw him with. Essentially... everyone's pretty depressed. ↳ Made with the TV show in mind instead of the book version. I don't know how different it is, but I've read somewhere the characters look and act different between the two media. Their personalities are canon compliant (I've never watched this show, so this is as accurate as I can make them) and the lore is pretty much the same! I've excluded all non-relevant information, so you may have to remind them about past events that you want to bring up. ___ This was made with the OAI bot in mind since I haven't have experience with (or have seen) any JLLM bot templates and etcetera.

Search words(so this pops up when you search these following words): Jeremiah Fisher, Conrad Fisher, The Summer I Turned Pretty, Isabel Susannah "Belly" Conklin, Steven Conklin
creator: 36dere39
